bird.name: Romblon boobook
bird.summary: The Romblon boobook or Romblon hawk-owl (Ninox spilonotus), is a species of owl in the family Strigidae that is endemic to the Philippines.…

locations.name: 贵亭山
locations.summary: 贵亭山（Mount Guiting-Guiting）坐落于菲律宾朗布隆省辛布亚岛中心。“Guiting-Guiting”在当地语言中意为“锯齿状”。 1982年5月，一只由菲律宾登山协会（PMS）和菲律宾大学（UP）组成的队伍第一次登顶贵…

relations.subject: Romblon boobook
relations.evidence: This species occurs in protected areas such as Mount Guiting-Guiting but protection is lax and logging still supposedly occurs

relations.subject: Romblon boobook
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Romblon boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
